title: Touch 1: First-Contact Pager Generation
description: Walk through the complete Touch 1 first-contact pager workflow: from generation through the 3-gate HITL review, a lowfi regeneration demo, and final delivery actions.

steps.narration: Start by navigating to the Touch 1 First-Contact Pager page for the Meridian Dynamics deal. This is where you create a one-page overview document tailored to your prospect.
This page centers the pager generation controls and deal context in one place. It is the starting point for building a personalized one-pager from approved inputs.
After clicking generate, the AI begins building your first-contact pager. The progress indicator shows the workflow is actively processing your deal data.
The outline gate is your first review checkpoint. Here the AI surfaces a draft headline, a value proposition, and key capability bullets so you can confirm the story before moving on.
Use this review moment to validate the outline framing in context. Make sure the headline, value proposition, and key capability bullets align with your sales strategy before moving forward.
After approving the outline, the workflow moves into the draft gate with expanded section cards, supporting copy, and metrics for a fuller review.
Here you can see the structured draft with a headline, section cards, detailed body copy, metrics, and key points. This is the main review surface before you approve or regenerate.
If you want another pass, open the Re-generate flow and add optional feedback. This lets you request a stronger draft without leaving the review stage.

actions.value: Tighten the headline and lead with turnaround metrics.

steps.narration: The AI has regenerated the draft based on your feedback. Notice the updated headline and stronger section content. The refine loop lets you iterate until the pager is exactly right.
The refined draft is back on screen with a stronger headline and tighter sections. Use this checkpoint to confirm the updated metrics and messaging before moving to the final gate.
After the draft is approved, the workflow pauses at the final gate. From here you can open the finished artifact and confirm it is ready before marking the touch complete.
The final review stage centers on the artifact link and approval controls, giving you one last checkpoint before the pager is marked ready.
All done! Your first-contact pager has been saved to Google Drive. Use the link on screen to open the delivered artifact right away.
Once the pager is saved, you can immediately kick off another version from the same screen using Generate Another.
The completion view keeps the Drive link and rerun controls together, so it is easy to open the delivered artifact or start a fresh generation with updated messaging.

callout.text: Re-run or open the final artifact
